message: build(mux): add Makefile for web + zig build

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+.PHONY: build web zig clean
+
+build: web zig
+
+web:
+	cd web && bun run build
+
+zig:
+	cd native && zig build
+
+clean:
+	rm -f web/client.js
+	rm -rf native/zig-out native/zig-cache

@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@
   "scripts": {
     "build": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --minify",
     "build:dev": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js",
-    "build:all": "bun run build && cd ../native && zig build",
     "dev": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --watch",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
   },
